import componentProps from './divider-props.yml';

<Meta of={DividerStories} name="Overview" />

# Divider

Horizontal rules with customizable thickness, width, color, and positioning. Uses CSS custom properties for flexible theming.

## Interactive Preview

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={DividerStories.Interactive} />
</div>
<Controls of={DividerStories.Interactive} />

## Properties

{twigPropsTable(componentProps, 'optional')}

## Thickness Variations

Six thickness options from hairline to 8px.

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={DividerStories.DividersThickness} />
</div>

## Width Variations

Four width presets (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%), centered.

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={DividerStories.DividersWidth} />
</div>

## Position Variations

Left and center positions at 50% width.

<div className="sb-contained-canvas">
  <Canvas of={DividerStories.DividersPosition} />
</div>

## Color Variations

Available line colors shown on themed backgrounds. Use design token values via `--color-divider`.

<Canvas of={DividerStories.DividersColor} />
